title: ADULT AND TEEN OUTPATIENT PROGRAM - 211info
text: LIFE RENEWAL PORTLAND ADULT AND TEEN OUTPATIENT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides faith based comprehensive outpatient substance abuse treatment services. Specializes in cognitive/behavior therapy, dialectical behavior therapy, and telemedicine therapy. Also accepts clients that are referred from the court/judicial system (other than DUI/DWI). 18600 SE McLoughlin Boulevard Milwaukie, OR 97267 Eligibility: Age 14 and older Hours: No standard hours Email (855) 932-3582 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (855) 932-3582 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for more information FEES: Varies by service. Accepts Medicaid and some private insurances. Sliding scale fees are available. DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clackamas and Multnomah Counties Services: Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment DUI Offender Programs Individual Counseling Relapse Prevention Programs Smoking/Vaping Cessation If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LIFE RENEWAL PORTLAND
